sections.content: Free soil testing and recommendations for every farm holding. Issued every 2 years. Tests 12 parameters: N, P, K, S, Zn, Fe, Cu, Mn, Bo, pH, EC, Organic Carbon. Card provides crop-wise fertilizer recommendations. Over 23 crore cards distributed. Helps reduce fertilizer overuse and improve yield.

sections.section_path: Soil Health Card > How to Get
sections.content: Automatic: soil samples collected by state agriculture dept staff from farms in a grid pattern. Can also request via: (1) Visit soil testing lab. (2) Contact block agriculture officer. (3) Apply at soilhealth.dac.gov.in (enter survey number/khasra). Card available online via portal (enter Aadhaar/mobile/card number).

sections.section_path: Soil Health Card > Using the Card
sections.content: Card shows: current nutrient status of soil (deficient/sufficient/excess for each parameter), recommended doses of fertilizers for 6 major crops grown in the area. Follow recommendations to: reduce input cost by 10-15%, improve soil quality over time, get better crop yields. Update: new card every 2 years with fresh testing.
